name: polytomic-connector
description: Connect Claude Desktop to a Polytomic MCP server.

server_url.title: MCP server URL
server_url.description: Full URL of your Polytomic MCP endpoint, ending in /mcp — e.g. https://mcp.polytomic.com/mcp

api_key.title: Polytomic API key
api_key.description: A Polytomic API key. Create one in Polytomic under Settings -> API keys.

read_only.title: Read-only access
read_only.description: Restrict this connection to read-only Polytomic operations. Leave unchecked for full access.
